findings.title: Sidecar dispatcher bypasses validateTopicSafety for instant-answer
findings.fix: Lift validateTopicSafety(input.question) into dispatcher before runSidecarSafe

findings.title: parent-message route has no Zod validation
findings.vector: prompt-injection -> tone-flip on parent phone call
findings.fix: Add Zod schema with max(500); add validateTopicSafety on teacherNote+reasonContext

findings.title: /api/ai/intent passes raw prompt to agentRouterFlow with no validation
findings.vector: orchestrator prompt-injection; reflected XSS via topic in NAVIGATE URL
findings.fix: Zod-validate prompt max 2000; validateTopicSafety before agentRouterFlow

findings.title: validateTopicSafety missing from 7 of 11 Genkit flows
findings.fix: Add validateTopicSafety on primary user text field in every flow

findings.title: VIDYA action.flow JSON drives auto-navigation without allowlist re-validation
findings.fix: Strict allowlist on action.flow; max(500) on every params.*

findings.title: Triple-stash Handlebars on free-text fields skips HTML escaping
findings.fix: Switch to double-stash; adopt sidecar U+27E6/U+27E7 marker pattern

findings.title: Sidecar data-marker U+27E6/U+27E7 is forgeable by user input
findings.fix: Escape U+27E6/U+27E7 in user input or use per-request nonce delimiter
